title: Kth Missing Positive Number
titleCn: 第 k 个缺失的正整数

testcases.input: arr = [2,3,4,7,11], k = 5 Output: 9 Explanation: The missing positive integers are [1,5,6,8,9,10,12,13,...]. The 5th missing positive integer is 9.
testcases.expectedOutput: 9 Explanation: The missing positive integers are [1,5,6,8,9,10,12,13,...]. The 5th missing positive integer is 9.

testcases.input: arr = [1,2,3,4], k = 2 Output: 6 Explanation: The missing positive integers are [5,6,7,...]. The 2nd missing positive integer is 6.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: The missing positive integers are [5,6,7,...]. The 2nd missing positive integer is 6.
